buttons.primary: h-10 px-6 rounded-lg bg-blue-600 text-white hover:bg-blue-700 transition-all shadow-sm hover:shadow-md font-medium
buttons.secondary: h-10 px-6 rounded-lg bg-white border border-slate-200 text-slate-700 hover:bg-slate-50 hover:text-blue-600 transition-all font-medium
buttons.ghost: h-10 px-4 rounded-lg text-slate-600 hover:bg-blue-50 hover:text-blue-700 transition-all font-medium

cards.base: bg-white rounded-xl border border-slate-100 shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-shadow duration-200
cards.interactive: group relative bg-white rounded-xl border border-slate-200 p-6 hover:border-blue-300 transition-all duration-300 cursor-pointer overflow-hidden
cards.metric: bg-white p-6 rounded-xl border border-slate-100 shadow-sm relative overflow-hidden

inputs.base: flex h-10 w-full rounded-lg border border-slate-200 bg-white px-3 py-2 text-sm ring-offset-white file:border-0 file:bg-transparent file:text-sm file:font-medium placeholder:text-slate-500 focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-blue-500 focus-visible:ring-offset-2 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50

badges.success: inline-flex items-center rounded-full border border-green-200 bg-green-50 px-2.5 py-0.5 text-xs font-semibold transition-colors focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-green-400 focus:ring-offset-2 text-green-700
badges.warning: inline-flex items-center rounded-full border border-yellow-200 bg-yellow-50 px-2.5 py-0.5 text-xs font-semibold transition-colors text-yellow-700
badges.info: inline-flex items-center rounded-full border border-blue-200 bg-blue-50 px-2.5 py-0.5 text-xs font-semibold transition-colors text-blue-700

image_strategy.style: Professional, Bright, Diverse, Authentic working environments

instructions_to_main_agent: Use 'Outfit' for all headings (h1-h3) and 'Inter' for body text.
Strictly follow the Blue/White/Slate color palette. Do not use random colors.
For the Dashboard, use the 'Metric Card' layout: Icon + Value + Label + Trend.
Implement the 'Matching' feature using a progress ring or percentage bar visual.
Ensure all interactive elements have hover states defined in the 'buttons' section.
Use Shadcn UI components for complex interactions (Dialog, Popover, Command) but style them with the defined radius and shadows.
Maintain generous padding inside cards (p-6 or p-8).
Use 'lucide-react' for icons. Pick clean, outlined icons.
For the 'Particulier' dashboard, focus on personal growth and clear next steps.
For the 'Entreprise' dashboard, focus on data density and clear candidate lists.
For the 'Partenaire' dashboard, focus on case management and status tracking.

rules: Ensure text contrast ratio of at least 4.5:1 for normal text.
Use semantic HTML (main, section, article, nav).
All images must have meaningful alt text.
Interactive elements must have visible focus states (ring-2 ring-blue-500).
Do not rely on color alone to convey state (use icons or text labels).
